title: quercus × schwarzii
intro: Quercus × schwarzii, also known as the Schwarz oak or the hybrid white oak, is a deciduous tree species that belongs to the Quercus genus. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties due to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Quercus × schwarzii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Quercus × schwarzii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat conditions such as fever, coughs, and digestive issues.
